scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:env:sync && node ./node_modules/dotenv-cli/cli.js -e ../.env.local -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:dev: npm run db:env:sync && node ./node_modules/dotenv-cli/cli.js -e ../.env.local -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed:demo-orders: npm run db:env:sync && node ./node_modules/dotenv-cli/cli.js -e ../.env.local -- node prisma/seed-demo-orders.js
scripts.db:seed:demo-testimonials: npm run db:env:sync && node ./node_modules/dotenv-cli/cli.js -e ../.env.local -- node prisma/seed-demo-testimonials.js
scripts.db:studio: npm run db:env:sync && node ./node_modules/dotenv-cli/cli.js -e ../.env.local -- prisma studio
